pr.title: PR #140 — Execution Result Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds the **execution-result** layer on top of the Execution Attempt v2 / Execution Step / Capability Knowledge Graph layers — the next step in the execution roadmap (`Attempt = a specific attempt` → `Result = what the attempt produced`). Same deterministic, append-only, observational-only pattern as the prior execution layers; no execution/orchestration/scheduling/optimization/worker-assignment (per non-goals). Upstream layers are consumed read-only.

New module `src/axiom_core/execution_result.py` (`ExecutionResult` / `ExecutionResultType` / `ExecutionResultStatus` / `ExecutionResultReference` / `ExecutionResultReport` / `ExecutionResultEvidence` / `ExecutionResultEngine`) + 4 CLI commands + 55 tests. Clean v1 — no name collision.

Model:
```
ExecutionResult(result_id, attempt_id, step_id, capability_id,
                result_type ∈ OUTPUT|VALIDATION|ERROR|ARTIFACT|REPORT|NO_ACTION|OTHER,
                status ∈ PRODUCED|FAILED|PARTIAL|EMPTY|UNKNOWN,
                references[ATTEMPT|STEP|CAPABILITY|FILE|ARTIFACT|VALIDATION|KNOWLEDGE_NODE|OTHER],
                summary, created_at, schema_version, raw_payload)
ExecutionResultReport(report_id, result_count, status_counts, result_type_counts,
                      failed_count, empty_count, produced_count,
                      duplicate_result_count, created_at)
```

Engine behavior (mirrors the attempt layer, minus duration):
- **Deterministic ordering** by `(attempt_id, step_id, capability_id, result_type, status, result_id)`; references sorted by `(reference_type, reference_value, reference_id)`.
- **Dedup** by `(attempt_id, step_id, capability_id, result_type)`, keep first in sorted order, count surplus.
- Status / result-type aggregation; failed/empty/produced detection (counts of `FAILED`/`EMPTY`/`PRODUCED` statuses).
- Case-insensitive normalization of status/result_type/reference_type; validation rejects unknown enums / missing required fields.
- Evidence bundle always written under `artifacts/execution_result/<run_id>/` (`execution_result_request.json`, `execution_result_result.json`, `execution_result_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json`, plus `report.json`).

Pass/fail gate: `passed = result_count > 0 and failed_count == 0 and empty_count == 0` (empty report → fail).

CLI: `execution-result-create` (`--result-file`, `--json-output`), `execution-results`, `execution-result-show <id>`, `execution-result-export <id> --format markdown|json|csv`. Registered in `command_registry.py`; `test_command_registry` EXPECTED set, `test_selection_engine` map, and `.gitignore` updated.

## Validation
- New tests: `tests/test_execution_result.py` (+55).
- `poetry run pytest -q` → **4860 passed, 1 skipped** (baseline 4805 at #139).
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` → 0 errors.
- CLI smoke (adversarial fixture: 5 results → 1 case-insensitive duplicate `(att-1,stp-1,cap-1,OUTPUT)`, 1 FAILED, 1 EMPTY, lowercase status/type, out-of-order refs) → result_count 4, failed 1, empty 1, produced 2, duplicate 1; status `{EMPTY:1,FAILED:1,PRODUCED:2}`; deterministic order; refs sorted ATTEMPT→STEP.

## Scope / Risk
Fully additive new module + CLI; no changes to existing frameworks or the Revit 2024 baseline. Observational/declarative only.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
